type: 左右双栏研究总览（研究内容 + 时间表）
goal: 生成一张博士中期答辩首页用的研究总览图，左侧展示 4 个研究内容模块，右侧展示按学期划分的进度路线，主题为多模态大模型辅助医疗影像诊断，要求正式克制、白底、工程化配色

canvas.render_quality: vector-clean look, anti-aliased edges, sharp text

title_block.main_title: Multimodal Foundation Models for Clinical Imaging Diagnosis
title_block.subtitle: 面向临床影像诊断的多模态大模型
title_block.occasion_label: 博士学位论文中期答辩
title_block.position: top-center, main_title in bold sans-serif 22pt, subtitle in regular 13pt below in gray, occasion_label in italic gray 10pt at top-right

background_section.label: Background & Problem
background_section.summary: 现有医疗影像诊断系统多为单模态、专科专用，难以适配多模态场景与长尾病种
background_section.key_question: 如何在多模态影像-文本-报告联合表征下，实现可解释、可信的辅助诊断？
background_section.position: compact strip across the upper band, full width

objective_section.label: Objective
objective_section.summary: 构建跨模态、跨任务的医疗影像基础模型，并形成临床可用诊断辅助方案
objective_section.position: compact strip directly below background, centered, narrower than background

items.name: Data & Pretraining
items.summary: 构建影像-报告大规模配对语料并完成跨模态预训练

items.name: Diagnostic Tasks
items.summary: 针对病灶检测、报告生成、鉴别诊断等任务进行下游适配

items.name: Reliability
items.summary: 研究幻觉缓解、不确定性表征与可解释证据链

items.name: Clinical Validation
items.summary: 联合医院在真实门诊与急诊场景完成可控临床试用

research_modules.layout: left column of four equal-height modules stacked vertically; all modules identical width and identical style

expected_outcome_section.label: Expected Outcomes
expected_outcome_section.items: 多模态医疗影像基础模型权重、面向 5 类临床任务的诊断辅助系统、可解释证据链评估方法学
expected_outcome_section.position: below the left column, full-left-column width, visually distinct from research_modules but stylistically consistent

module_block_style.size_per_module: all four research modules identical size, vertically aligned
module_block_style.fill: very light slate tint #F1F5F9 for research modules; very light cyan tint #ECFEFF for the outcome block
module_block_style.title_text: module name in bold sans-serif (Inter / Helvetica + PingFang SC), 13pt
module_block_style.summary_text: single phrase, 10pt regular, max 2 lines, no period

right_panel_timeline.title: Research Timeline
right_panel_timeline.axis: horizontal time axis along the right column, divided into 4 semesters labeled 'S1 / S2 / S3 / S4'
right_panel_timeline.rule: thin time-axis line with small node circles for milestones; each milestone connects horizontally to the corresponding research module on the left via a faint dashed leader line; node labels are short phrases (≤6 chars in English / ≤8 chars in Chinese)

connectors.style: thin arrows (1.2px) with simple triangle arrowheads, dark gray #334155
connectors.rule: vertical flow background → objective → research modules within the left column; horizontal dashed leader lines connect each module to its milestone on the right timeline; no other connectors
connectors.decoration: no curved arcs, no decorative dashed lines beyond the leader lines

color_palette.rule: deep blue #1E3A8A as primary, slate blue #3B82F6 as secondary, charcoal #1F2937 for text and lines; one low-saturation amber #F59E0B accent reserved for milestone node circles on the timeline only

typography.rule: english as primary line, chinese as smaller secondary line in gray; Inter / Helvetica for english, PingFang SC / Source Han Sans for chinese
typography.consistency: all module titles identical size; all summaries identical size; timeline node labels share one consistent style

must_keep: left-to-right ratio approximately 3:2 (left research column wider, right timeline column narrower)
all four research modules identical size
white background, no gradient, no decorative pattern
language and font consistency across the figure
summaries are short phrases, never full paragraphs
the figure must look like a doctoral mid-term defense cover slide, not a corporate roadmap
avoid: decorative icons, emoji, mascots, hand-drawn wobble
3D rendering, glossy fills, lens flare, drop shadow blocks
fabricated quantitative claims (no fabricated AUC, sensitivity, accuracy numbers)
saturated brand colors, neon, vivid gradients
dense text walls; no module summary should exceed 2 lines
hospital or university logos unless explicitly requested
